_comment: Example MCP server configuration required by vladyslav-skills. Copy the `mcpServers.mempalace` block into your `~/.claude/settings.json` (user-scope) and adjust paths/env to your local MemPalace install. This file lives in the plugin repo for reference only — Claude Code does not auto-load it.

mempalace._comment: Long-term cross-session memory. Required by 8 skills: add-feature, fix-bug, discover, discover-apple-check, design-sync, seed-mempalace, pre-release-check, compact-save.
